dct_title_s: [Series of maps from Palmer's Bible atlas]
dct_alternative_sm: Bible atlas, or, sacred geography delineated : in a complete series of scriptural maps, drawn from the best authorities, ancient and modern
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
2 bar scales on map given in "English miles" and "Jewish furlongs".
Shows topography, drainage, boundaries, travel routes, territorial boundaries of the tribes of Israel, places of historical interest.
Map [1] has 2 inset maps: Eden -- Contiguous extremities of Asia and America.
Appears in Palmer's The Bible atlas, or, sacred geography delineated : in a complete series of scriptural maps, drawn from the best authorities, ancient and modern.

[1] The world as known to the ancients, shewing the dispersion and supposed settling of the descendants of Noah -- [2] Map of the countries, mentioned in the histories of Noah, Abraham and the kings of Israel [3] Canaan : adapted to the book of Genesis -- [4] Egypt, or the land of Mizraim -- [5] Journeyings of the Israelites, from Egypt to the land of Canaan -- [6] Tribe of Reuben -- [7] Tribe of Gad -- [8] Manasseh : beyond Jordan -- [9] Tribe of Judah -- [10] Tribe of Simeon -- [11] Tribe of Dan -- [12] Tribe of Benjamin -- [13] Tribe of Ephraim -- [14] Half of tribe of Manasseh -- [15] Tribe of Issachar -- [16] Tribe of Zebulon -- [17] Tribe of Asher -- [18] Tribe of Naphtali -- [19] Canaan : shewing the relative situation of the allotments to the tribes of Israel, adapted to the books of Judges & Samuel -- [20] Ancient Jerusalem : with the land of Moriah -- [21] Judah and Israel : illustrating the books of Kings -- [22] The dominions of David and Solomon -- [23] Canaan, shewing the captivities of Judah & Israel -- [24] Canaan : adapted to the Gospel history and exhibiting the principal travels of Jesus Christ -- [25] Map of Canaan, or the Holy Land, for general purposes -- [26] Travels and voyages of St. Paul.
